profile.name: Pratik Shastrakar
profile.title: Associate @ Morgan Stanley
profile.bio: SRE with passion for DevOps and Cloud, based in Mumbai, India.

socials.name: GitHub
socials.label: Check out my projects on GitHub

projects.title: Automated Deployment & Full-Stack Observability
projects.description: Designed and deployed a containerized multi-service application on AWS EKS using Terraform and ArgoCD (GitOps). Built a complete observability pipeline utilizing OpenTelemetry to aggregate telemetry data, Grafana dashboards for SLI/SLO tracking, and Jaeger for distributed tracing and rapid root-cause analysis.

projects.title: Jenkins Pipeline for Java-based Application
projects.description: This end-to-end Jenkins pipeline automates your Java application's CI/CD journey, ensuring seamless deployment using tools like SonarQube, Argo CD, and Kubernetes. 🛠️

projects.title: AWS S3 Event Trigger
projects.description: An AWS-based event-triggered application that automatically sends email notifications when files are uploaded to an S3 bucket. Utilizes AWS Lambda (Python), Amazon S3, Amazon SNS, and jq JSON processor for seamless real-time notifications.

projects.title: MERN Chat App
projects.description: A One-on-One chatting app made using MERN Stack with real-time chatting animations using Socket.io. Supports personal as well as group chatting.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A fully responsive multi-page website with elegant animations. Styled with React-Bootstrap and CSS for easy customization. Hosts resume and other projects.

projects.title: Online Gym Website
projects.description: A website that displays various exercises with targeted muscles, GIFs, and video tutorials for proper execution. Built with React.js and Material UI, using ExerciseDB and YouTube APIs.

projects.title: Sudoku Solver
projects.description: A Sudoku solver implemented in C++ using a backtracking algorithm to fill cells with correct entries. Verified using Row, Column, and Grid criteria. Frontend created with HTML and CSS.

details: Engineered automated release workflows and reliability frameworks for Tier-1 PnL Reporting applications.
Scaled infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps principles, enabling faster environment provisioning and consistent configuration management.
Implemented end-to-end CI/CD pipelines with integrated security scanning and automated unit testing, reducing deployment failures and improving lead time for changes.
Designed self-service observability dashboards (Grafana, Splunk), empowering developers with real-time insights and reducing Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by 2 hours.
Automated complex operational tasks and data pipelines using Python and Shell, eliminating manual toil and increasing team productivity by 40%.

Facilitated collaboration between Dev and Ops teams to drive incident post-mortems and proactive capacity planning for peak financial reporting periods. (Quarter end and Year end earning release cycles.)
Automated Linux system administration tasks using Shell scripting & Cron jobs, reducing manual effort by 60%.
Designed and deployed Dockerized applications, integrating CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, cutting deployment failures by 30%.
Monitored and optimized system performance with Prometheus & Grafana, enhancing infrastructure visibility.
Developed a solid understanding of .NET framework and its applications in creating scalable and efficient software solutions.
Developed infrastructure as code using Terraform, automating cloud deployments.
Integrated Jenkins with Kubernetes for seamless CI/CD pipeline automation.
Orchestrated containerized applications on Kubernetes, ensuring security and scalability.
Proficient in core Microsoft Azure fundamentals, adept at creating and managing resources.
Developed and hosted a prototype project on Azure Static Web Apps.
Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) for Azure Blob storage, ensuring secure resource access.
